items.reason: Reads from a static in-memory demo BOOKINGS dataset; deterministic and side-effect free, so live execution is safe and reproducible.
Pure function over the ticket_type argument with no external calls or shared state; deterministic and safe to run live.
Mutates the shared in-memory BOOKINGS dataset, so live runs can leak seat-change state across scenarios and simulation reruns; mock to keep runs deterministic and non-destructive.
